emails.subject: Something new coming Thursday
emails.body:
Quick heads up.

I've been building something for the past [X weeks/months]. It's almost ready.

On Thursday, I'm opening it up to email subscribers first.

What it is: [ONE SENTENCE DESCRIPTION]

Who it's for: [TARGET AUDIENCE]

Why I built it: [BRIEF BACKSTORY]

No action needed today. Just wanted you to know it's coming.

Talk Thursday.

[Name]

emails.subject: Tomorrow: [PRODUCT NAME] goes live
emails.body:
[PRODUCT NAME] launches tomorrow at [TIME].

Here's what you're getting:

[FEATURE 1] - [Benefit]
[FEATURE 2] - [Benefit]
[FEATURE 3] - [Benefit]

Price: $[X]

But as an email subscriber, you get early access + [BONUS/DISCOUNT].

I'll send the link tomorrow at [TIME]. Watch your inbox.

[Name]

P.S. Reply if you have questions. Happy to answer before launch.

emails.subject: [PRODUCT NAME] is live
emails.body:
It's here.

[PRODUCT NAME] is officially live.

[GET IT NOW BUTTON]

**What you get:**
- [Feature 1]
- [Feature 2]
- [Feature 3]
- [SUBSCRIBER BONUS]

**Price:** $[X] (subscriber price)

I built this because [REASON]. It solves [PROBLEM] for [AUDIENCE].

If that's you, grab it now:
[GET IT NOW BUTTON]

Questions? Reply to this email.

[Name]

emails.subject: What people are saying about [PRODUCT NAME]
emails.body:
Quick update on [PRODUCT NAME].

[X] people have grabbed it since Thursday. Here's what they're saying:

"[TESTIMONIAL 1]" - [Name]

"[TESTIMONIAL 2]" - [Name]

"[TESTIMONIAL 3]" - [Name]

The early feedback has been solid. People are getting [SPECIFIC RESULT].

If you've been on the fence:
[GET IT NOW BUTTON]

Subscriber pricing ends [DATE].

[Name]

emails.subject: Last call: [PRODUCT NAME]
emails.body:
Final reminder.

Subscriber pricing for [PRODUCT NAME] ends tonight at midnight.

After that, price goes to $[HIGHER PRICE].

**Quick recap:**
- [Main benefit 1]
- [Main benefit 2]
- [Main benefit 3]

**Results so far:**
- [X] buyers
- [SPECIFIC OUTCOME people are getting]

If you want it at the subscriber price:
[GET IT NOW BUTTON]

After midnight, the price goes up and I won't email about this again.

[Name]

P.S. If you have a question that's stopping you from buying, reply now. I'll answer before the deadline.
